Product range

Tape solutions for every industrial application

From electrical insulation to floor marking and specialty double-sided systems — engineered, tested and manufactured in-house.

Deon 31700

PVC Electrical Insulation

Premium PVC tape with rubber adhesive. UV, acid and solvent resistant.

View →

Deon 41860

Floor Marking

High-visibility marking tape for safety zones and warehouse layouts.

View →

Deon 50W13

Wire Harness

Automotive-grade harnessing tape for bundling and abrasion protection.

View →

Deon DT5142

Double-Sided Foam

Cushioned bonding tape for mounting, sealing and gap-filling.

View →

Deon DT31xx

Glass Cloth

High-temperature glass fibre tape for coil and transformer insulation.

View →

Deon DT11xx

Double-Sided Polyester

Thin, high-strength bonding for splicing and precision assembly.

View →

Deon DT3741

HDPE Fabric

Durable woven-backed tape for heavy-duty sealing and repair.

View →
